info.name: E-Commerce API - Current Collection
info.description:
Current API collection for the Laravel e-commerce backend with Sanctum authentication.

Base URL: http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1

Highlights:
- Authentication, users, cart, addresses, coupons, and orders
- Public catalog, seller area, and super admin flows
- Reviews & ratings with verified purchase moderation
- Product discount pricing with final_price and rating summaries

Role IDs:
- Admin: 1
- Seller: 2
- Customer: 3

item.name: Authentication

request.description:
Register a new user account.

**Required Fields:**
- name
- email (unique)
- phone (10-20 chars, unique)
- password
- password_confirmation

**Optional:**
- image_path (file, max 2MB)
- role_id (Owner only)

Authenticate user and receive Bearer token.

**Rate Limit:** 10 attempts per 5 minutes

**Required:**
- email
- password

Update authenticated user's profile.

**All fields optional** - send only what needs to be updated.

**Note:** If updating password, password_confirmation is required.
Revoke current authentication token.

Permanently delete the authenticated user's account.

⚠️ **Warning:** This action cannot be undone.

item.description: User authentication and profile management endpoints.

request.description:
Retrieve all products with optional filters and sorting.

**Query Parameters (all optional):**
- search
- category_id
- min_price / max_price
- is_active
- sort_by / sort_direction

formdata.description: Product description in English (required, min 3, max 255)
Product description in Arabic (required, min 3, max 255)

request.description:
Create a new product in main catalog.

**Permission:** Super Admin only (role_id = 1)

**Required:**
- name_en, name_ar
- description_en, description_ar
- price
- stock

**Optional:**
- image_url (main image)
- images[] (additional images array)

Update existing product.

**Permission:** Super Admin only (role_id = 1)

**All fields optional** - send only what needs updating.

Delete a single product.

**Permission:** Owner only (role_id = 1)

Delete all products from main catalog.

**Permission:** Owner only (role_id = 1)

⚠️ **Warning:** This deletes ALL products!

item.name: Reviews & Ratings
item.description: Product reviews, rating moderation, and review visibility endpoints.

query.description: Public users see approved only. Admin or product owner can use pending|approved|rejected|all.

request.description: List product reviews. Public visibility is limited to approved reviews, while admins and product owners can filter moderation states.
Create one review per product for the authenticated customer. The customer must have a completed purchase for the product, and the review starts as pending moderation.
Update the authenticated user review for the product. Updates return the review to pending moderation.
Delete the authenticated user review for the selected product.
Approve, reject, or return a review to pending as a super admin. Approved reviews are included in public rating summaries.

Get admin's own products.

**Permission:** Admin only (role_id = 2)

**Note:** Shows only products created by the authenticated admin.

Create a new admin product.

**Permission:** Admin only (role_id = 2)

**Required:**
- name
- price

Get single admin product details.

**Permission:** Admin only (can only view own products)

Update admin product.

**Permission:** Admin only (can only update own products)

**All fields optional**

Delete admin product.

**Permission:** Admin only (can only delete own products)

Delete all admin's own products.

**Permission:** Admin only

⚠️ **Note:** Deletes only the authenticated admin's products.

Retrieve all categories.

**Query Parameters:**
- search (optional)

Create a new category.

**Permission:** Super Admin only (role_id = 1)

**Required:**
- name (unique)

**Optional:**
- description
- is_active (default 1)

Update existing category.

**Permission:** Owner only (role_id = 1)

**All fields optional**

Delete a category.

**Permission:** Super Admin only (role_id = 1)

Delete all categories.

**Permission:** Super Admin only (role_id = 1)

⚠️ **Warning:** This deletes ALL categories!

Get orders list.

**Permissions:**
- Regular users: see only own orders
- Super Admin: see all orders

Create a new order.

**Required:**
- product_id (must exist)
- quantity (min 1)

**Optional:**
- notes

**Automatic:**
- Generates order_number
- Calculates total_amount
- Decreases product stock
- Creates order_item

Get order details.

**Permissions:**
- Order owner can view
- Super Admin can view any

Update order status.

**Permission:** Super Admin only

**Optional Fields:**
- status (pending|processing|completed|cancelled)
- notes

Delete an order.

**Permission:** Super Admin only

item.name: Order Items

request.description:
Get order items list.

**Query Parameters:**
- order_id (optional)

**Permissions:**
- Users see items from own orders
- Admin/Super Admin see all

Add item to existing order.

**Required:**
- order_id (must own order)
- product_id (must exist)
- quantity (min 1)

**Optional:**
- price (defaults to product price)

**Automatic:**
- Decreases product stock
- Recalculates order total

Get order item details.

**Permissions:**
- Order owner can view
- Admin/Super Admin can view any

Update order item.

**Optional Fields:**
- quantity (adjusts stock automatically)
- price

**Automatic:**
- Adjusts product stock based on quantity change
- Recalculates order total

Delete order item.

**Automatic:**
- Restores product stock
- Recalculates order total

item.description: Order items management with automatic stock adjustments.

request.description:
Get all roles.

**Permission:** Super Admin only (slug = 'super-admin')

Create a new role.

**Permission:** Super Admin only

**Required:**
- name (unique, max 255)

**Optional:**
- description

**Automatic:**
- Slug generated from name

Get role details.

**Permission:** Super Admin only

Update role.

**Permission:** Super Admin only

**Optional Fields:**
- name (cannot change 'super-admin' role name)
- description

**Note:** Slug auto-updates if name changes

Delete role.

**Permission:** Super Admin only

**Restrictions:**
- Cannot delete 'super-admin' role
- Cannot delete 'admin' role
- Cannot delete roles with assigned users

Assign role to user.

**Permission:** Super Admin only

**Required:**
- user_id (must exist)
- role_id (must exist)
